payload.answer: Which Sam do you mean? I don’t have enough confidence to save this note to the right person without clarification.

entity_resolution.reason: The note refers to an ambiguous 'Sam' and model confidence is low; cloud escalation is disabled, so no durable memory should be committed without user clarification.

details: No memory was saved because entity resolution confidence was low.
Cloud escalation was disabled, so the system must ask the user for clarification.

repair_options: Ask the user to identify which Sam the note refers to.
Do not commit durable memory until the entity is clarified.
